subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto her who hath hearkened and responded, and who hath attained unto the days of her Lord, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. O Leaf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن للتی سمعت و اجابت و فازت بایام ربها المهیمن القیوم ای ورقه
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @high station of the true believer, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
